---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: feature
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how the feature should work.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why were they ruled out?

## Design Considerations

If this involves UI changes, describe how it fits within the [design system](../../DESIGN.md):
- Grayscale only (no chromatic colors)
- Pill radius (9999px) for interactive elements, 12px for containers
- Zero shadows
- Font weight 400 or 500 only

## Additional Context

Mockups, screenshots, links to related issues, or any other context.
